not 1080 as advertised the native resolution of this unit is 720 that means the element within the projector that creates the display is 1280 x 720 it supports 1080 which means you can put 1080 video into it but it will be scaled down there is no internal battery this must be plugged in with the included adapter actual power connector on the unit is a weird 4 pin port with a 3 prong electrical plug back panel has a single full size hdmi port and a usba port for connections if a usb drive is connected or an hdmi cable is inserted the unit base will not be able to rotate completely as it will hit the usb drive or cable the underside of the base does include a 14 mounting thread so it can be mounted on a tripod focus ring works well and it does produce a sharp image menus are straight forward and clean looking shortest distance i was able to get it in focus was about 40 the unit is light weight and easy to use i bought this for halloween projection mapping and it works just fine if you want to watch movies while camping youll need an external power source like a solar generator i dont believe this can be powered by usb but i didnt test it to turn on or off press and hold the power button on the back end for about 3 seconds sound isnt bad but not great internal fan is kinda loud which will drown out soft or quiet movies no external audio port you can connect to bluetooth speakers and the volume control will affect the bluetooth level there is a delay in the audio the audio is about half a second behind the video lip sync is noticeably off if the connection is lost the unit will revert back to internal speaker after about 510 seconds extra bonus this comes with i think 7 different stars and galaxy projections to shine on your ceiling however the frame rate is poor on these videos playback of these star videos are choppy video playback of external content is smooth i took off 1 star because this is advertised as 1080 and it is not
